notes: v2.9.1 — Remisier QR tab: dedicated tab in Affiliate QR Code view for remisiers with commission rate display. Plot No. tracking in QR codes (embedded as _pPLOT suffix, shown in Layout Scan Log). Auto-commission on bot booking: if customer referred by active remisier, pending commission auto-created. Commission Pending Review panel: admin can Verify (Approved) or Reject auto-commissions. Login banner for pending commissions shown to admin/bot_md roles.
